description: Framework-specific overlay specs for the Feature Surface Metadata Analyst. Base feature grouping rules remain built into the specialist prompt.
selectionRules: Read this manifest first, then load only the framework specs supported by repository evidence.
A single repository may require multiple specs when it has more than one runtime surface, such as Next.js plus Axum.
Prefer framework-specific specs over language-only guesses.
If no matching spec exists, continue with the built-in path model and conservative repository evidence.

specs.title: Next.js App Router
specs.description: Overlay guidance for App Router pages, route handlers, server actions, and hybrid page/API flows.

specs.title: Rust Axum
specs.description: Overlay guidance for Axum routers, nested services, handlers, extractors, and backend state boundaries.

specs.title: Express
specs.description: Overlay guidance for Express routers, controllers, rendered templates, redirects, and middleware-driven flows.

specs.title: Spring Boot MVC
specs.description: Overlay guidance for Spring MVC controllers, template rendering, REST endpoints, services, and repositories.

specs.title: Go Gin
specs.description: Overlay guidance for Gin router declarations, route groups, middleware, HTML template rendering, and GORM-backed flows.

specs.title: Egg.js
specs.description: Overlay guidance for Egg.js router setup, controller/service layering, and framework conventions around app, ctx, and config.
